faq.description: Everything you need to know about navigating the platform, booking sessions, and becoming a verified teacher.
faq.a_whatIs: SkillsUp is a premium platform connecting students and parents with highly qualified, verified private teachers and tutors across Cameroon. Whether you need academic tutoring or music lessons, we have the right expert for you.
faq.q_roles: What is the difference between a Guest and a Teacher?
faq.a_roles: When you first sign up, you are assigned a 'Guest' role (also known as a Parent/Student). Guests can browse the platform, view teacher profiles, contact teachers, and leave reviews. 'Teachers' are users who have submitted a professional application, paid the verification fee, and been approved by our Admin team to offer their services.
faq.q_findTeacher: How do I find a teacher?
faq.a_findTeacher: You can find teachers by navigating to the 'Find Teachers' section from your dashboard or the navigation bar. You can browse through our list of top-rated verified professionals.
faq.q_contactTeacher: How do I contact a teacher?
faq.a_contactTeacher: Once you find a teacher you like, click on their profile to view their details, introduction video, and qualifications. On their profile page, you will find direct buttons to call them via Phone or message them instantly via WhatsApp.
faq.q_leaveReview: How do I leave a review for my teacher?
faq.a_leaveReview: After you've had a session with a teacher, visit their profile page while logged into your Guest account. You will see a prominent 'Leave a Review' section. Your ratings and feedback help maintain the quality of our platform!
faq.q_becomeTeacher: How do I become a verified teacher?
faq.a_becomeTeacher: First, create an account. Then, navigate to the Dashboard where you will be prompted to complete your Teacher Profile (including your bio, subjects, rate, and diplomas). Next, you must pay the one-time Verification Fee via Toumkap. Finally, your application will be sent to our Admin team for review.
faq.a_verificationFee: To maintain a high standard of quality and trust on SkillsUp, we charge a one-time verification fee of 10,000 XAF. This fee covers background checks and the processing of your application. You can pay this securely via Mobile Money using our Toumkap integration.
faq.q_approvalStatus: How will I know if my application is approved?
faq.a_approvalStatus: You can check the status of your application on your Dashboard at any time. Furthermore, if your profile is approved (or rejected with feedback), you will receive a notification in the notification bell located on your navigation bar.
faq.supportReady: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, our support team is always ready to help you out.
